Gift Hunter Gear

Once in a while, the unit casts infusion on themself and 2 allies with the lowest health. An infused unit restores 200000 health, increases damage, crit and physical armor piercing by 50% for 4 sec and reduces incoming damage by 50% for 4 sec. Also during this time, the armor wearer and allies affected by the ability restore health equal to 50% of the damage they deal.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event:

Event date:

Sage bot code: AR157

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs

Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
